# ShelbyAI — Complete AI Tool Directory

> Comprehensive AI tool reviews, comparisons, and pricing guides. Every tool tested hands-on for 7-14 days.
> Summary: https://www.shelby-ai.com/llms.txt

## About ShelbyAI
ShelbyAI is an independent AI tool review site for creators, freelancers, and small businesses. We test every tool for 7-14 days with real workflows. No sponsored rankings, no pay-to-play. Author: Frank Shelby (https://www.shelby-ai.com/author/frank-shelby/).

---

## All Reviewed Tools (32)

### Chatbase
- Category: ai-marketing-seo
- Rating: 3.9/5
- Best For: Businesses seeking to leverage AI chatbots trained on their specific data for enhanced customer interaction.
- Pricing: Free $0, Hobby $19//month, Standard $99//month, Unlimited $399//month
- Review: https://www.shelby-ai.com/reviews/chatbase-review/
- Pricing Guide: https://www.shelby-ai.com/pricing/chatbase/

### ChatGPT
- Category: ai-content-productivity
- Rating: 4.2/5
- Best For: Versatile creators needing a reliable AI assistant for writing, coding, and analysis.
- Pricing: Free $0, Plus $20//month, Pro $200//month, Team $30//user/month
- Review: https://www.shelby-ai.com/reviews/chatgpt-review/
- Pricing Guide: https://www.shelby-ai.com/pricing/chatgpt/
- Alternatives: https://www.shelby-ai.com/alternatives/chatgpt/

- Best For: Writers and researchers seeking nuanced, thoughtful AI-generated content.
- Pricing: Free $0, Pro $20//month, Team $30//user/month, Enterprise Custom
- Review: https://www.shelby-ai.com/reviews/claude-ai-review/
- Pricing Guide: https://www.shelby-ai.com/pricing/claude-ai/

## Comparisons (17)

- [ChatGPT vs Claude for Business: Which AI Assistant Delivers More Value? (2026)](https://www.shelby-ai.com/comparisons/chatgpt-vs-claude-for-business/) — We tested ChatGPT and Claude on real business tasks — emails, analysis, strategy, customer support, and coding. Here is which AI assistant actually helps small businesses more.

From ease of use to pricing, this analysis covers all aspects of AI writing tools.
- [Descript vs CapCut: Which Video Editor Is Better for Creators? (2026)](https://www.shelby-ai.com/comparisons/descript-vs-capcut/) — We edited the same video in both Descript and CapCut to compare AI features, editing speed, export quality, and pricing. Here is the real breakdown.
- [Descript vs Riverside vs CapCut (2026): Which AI Video Editor Wins?](https://www.shelby-ai.com/comparisons/descript-vs-riverside-vs-capcut/) — We compare Descript, Riverside, and CapCut across pricing, AI features, recording quality, and ease of use. See which tool wins for podcasters, social creators, remote interviews, and beginners.
- [ElevenLabs vs Murf AI: Which AI Voice Generator Sounds Better? (2026)](https://www.shelby-ai.com/comparisons/elevenlabs-vs-murf-ai/) — We generated the same scripts in both ElevenLabs and Murf AI to compare voice quality, naturalness, pricing, and real-world use cases. Here is the detailed verdict.
- [ElevenLabs vs Murf vs Play.ht: Best AI Voice Generator in 2026](https://www.shelby-ai.com/comparisons/elevenlabs-vs-murf-vs-playht/) — Three AI voice generators tested head-to-head. Which one sounds most natural and delivers the best value?
- [Frase vs Surfer SEO: Which Content Optimization Tool Wins? (2026)](https://www.shelby-ai.com/comparisons/frase-vs-surfer-seo/) — We ran identical content briefs through Frase and Surfer SEO to compare research depth, optimization accuracy, and value. Here is the honest breakdown.

From pricing to ease of use, we cover all angles.
- [Notion AI vs ClickUp AI vs Monday AI: Best AI Project Management for Small Teams](https://www.shelby-ai.com/comparisons/notion-ai-vs-clickup-vs-monday/) — Notion AI vs ClickUp AI vs Monday AI compared. Find the best AI project management tool for small teams based on features, ease of use, and pricing.
- [Otter.ai vs Fireflies vs Fathom: Best AI Meeting Assistant](https://www.shelby-ai.com/comparisons/otter-vs-fireflies-vs-fathom/) — In the battle of Otter vs Fireflies vs Fathom, we compare these AI tools to help you choose the best AI meeting notes tool for your needs, covering features, pricing, and more.

## Best-Of Lists (8)
